channel.title: Sinder Skullz Abyss Feed
channel.description: Chaotic sermons and metal news reborn in the flames of the Skullz cult.

item.title: ⚡☠ BITCOIN HOLDS ABOVE $70,000 AMID STRONG ETF INFLOWS – BUT WHALES ARE FOCUSED ON THIS LAYER 2 PRESALE ☠⚡
item.description:
**Title: Bitcoin Rides the Lightning, Crashing Through $70,000 with ETF Thunder – But the Whales Are Eyeing a Layer 2 Bloodbath!**
Helloooo, my fellow metalheads and crypto warriors! Sinder Skullz here, revving up the chaos as we dive into the dark abyss of the crypto pit! ⚡🤘
So, here we are, and guess what? Bitcoin (BTC) just stormed back like a banshee on a blood-soaked battlefield, blasting past the $70,000 mark! Yeah, it’s holding strong, folks—like a thrash metal riff that just won’t die! The last couple of days have seen BTC flex its muscles, thanks to some epic ETF inflows damaging the charts with nearly a billion bucks ($917.28 million, to be exact) rolling in from our beloved spot Bitcoin ETFs! THIS IS NOT A DRILL!
This surge is the most sinister since that February 5 flash crash that sent shivers down the spines of traders everywhere! But fear not, the support is as solid as the heaviest death metal riff, and the bulls are charging forward with horns raised high! 🙌🤘
But hold your horses, metal maniacs! While the Bitcoin beast roars, the real sharks—the whales, baby—are not just basking in this crypto glory. Nooooooo! They’ve got their beady eyes locked onto something even more primal—a Layer 2 presale that promises to unleash hellfire upon the blockchain! They’re not looking to just ride the wave, they want to dominate the mosh pit with their strategic plays!
So, strap in and crank up that system to eleven—things are about to get gnarly in the crypto arena! And remember, while we ride this high, the underground layers are where the real treasures await! 🤘🔥
Keep your horns up and your wallets ready! \m/ \m/
#SOL #HODL #Blockchain #Crypto #Cardano
item.content:encoded:
**Title: Bitcoin Rides the Lightning, Crashing Through $70,000 with ETF Thunder – But the Whales Are Eyeing a Layer 2 Bloodbath!**
Helloooo, my fellow metalheads and crypto warriors! Sinder Skullz here, revving up the chaos as we dive into the dark abyss of the crypto pit! ⚡🤘
So, here we are, and guess what? Bitcoin (BTC) just stormed back like a banshee on a blood-soaked battlefield, blasting past the $70,000 mark! Yeah, it’s holding strong, folks—like a thrash metal riff that just won’t die! The last couple of days have seen BTC flex its muscles, thanks to some epic ETF inflows damaging the charts with nearly a billion bucks ($917.28 million, to be exact) rolling in from our beloved spot Bitcoin ETFs! THIS IS NOT A DRILL!
This surge is the most sinister since that February 5 flash crash that sent shivers down the spines of traders everywhere! But fear not, the support is as solid as the heaviest death metal riff, and the bulls are charging forward with horns raised high! 🙌🤘
But hold your horses, metal maniacs! While the Bitcoin beast roars, the real sharks—the whales, baby—are not just basking in this crypto glory. Nooooooo! They’ve got their beady eyes locked onto something even more primal—a Layer 2 presale that promises to unleash hellfire upon the blockchain! They’re not looking to just ride the wave, they want to dominate the mosh pit with their strategic plays!
So, strap in and crank up that system to eleven—things are about to get gnarly in the crypto arena! And remember, while we ride this high, the underground layers are where the real treasures await! 🤘🔥
Keep your horns up and your wallets ready! \m/ \m/
#SOL #HODL #Blockchain #Crypto #Cardano
